title: Luscious Melted Brazilian Chicken Gratin
description: This rich and flavorful Brazilian-inspired dish is perfect for post-workout meals, packed with kabse spice, brine-dried chicken, and a hint of ayurvedic-rajasic flavor.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the brine-dried chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the kabse spice, salt, and black pepper over the chicken.
Dot the top of the chicken with ghee.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over the top of the chicken and return to the oven.
Bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
